englishDefinitions: A small adhesive strip bearing a slogan, political message, humorous phrase, or advertisement, designed to be stuck to the bumper of a car.
A short, catchy phrase meant to express a belief or viewpoint publicly.
examples: His car was covered in bumper stickers expressing his political views.
She designed a witty bumper sticker that became popular across the country.
The campaign created simple bumper stickers to spread their slogan.
